tasks.title: Enforce granular unit-test policy
tasks.notes: Policy: one behavior, one test; tests are isolated and named after the invariant; every task acceptance criteria must list the test file/name added. Updated EXECUTE.md and docs/hir-design.md.

tasks.title: Add JS/TS scenario test harness
tasks.notes: Run real JavaScript and TypeScript snippets through the runtime from Rust unit tests. Scenarios live in tests/scenarios/<category>/. Harness asserts on results, console output, or thrown errors.

tasks.title: Address strict linting violations (500-line files, 40-line functions, complexity 10)
tasks.notes: Enforce the 500/40/10 linter contract on every *.rs file in the workspace, including JS/TS/JSX/TSX spec-implementation code. No exemptions. cargo check lists remaining violations. Tests: add a build.rs unit test that asserts limits and traversal scope.

tasks.title: Implement the typed HIR execution model
tasks.notes: Type-aware HIR + trampoline interpreter aligned with JS/TS/JSX/TSX. Quick-win spec fixes are Phase 0; foundation/value model/trampoline are Phases 1-3. No stubs — unimplemented features throw. Tests: one Rust unit test per HIR op/shape/type guard; JS/TS scenario tests for end-to-end parity.

tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: Replace recursive interpreter with heap-allocated Vec<CallFrame> and trampoline loop. Required by typed HIR Phase 2. Tests: deep recursion without native stack overflow, exception unwind through frames, frame allocation edge cases; JS recursion scenario tests.

tasks.title: Leverage Rust for runtime execution model
tasks.notes: Apply Rust ownership/explicit-stack/ecosystem patterns. Supports Task 85 and 264. Tests: benchmark/regression tests for object shape lookups, scope chain walks, and value boxing overhead.

tasks.title: Implement real Promise resolution and microtasks
tasks.notes: Replace stub Promise with real thenable queue and microtask scheduling. Tests: then/catch ordering, microtask draining, rejection propagation, static methods; JS Promise scenario tests.

tasks.title: Implement native ES module support for Quench apps
tasks.notes: Load and link real ES modules instead of stripping imports/exports. Tests: import/export binding resolution, cyclic module graphs, default/named/namespace imports, module-level scope isolation; JS module scenario tests.

tasks.title: Analyze and enable whole-suite conformance runs
tasks.notes: Documented blockers: recursive interpreter stack overflow, global CURRENT_DEPTH counter, huge unsupported feature surface, baseline/harness gaps, runtime bugs. Tests: per-feature test262 pass-rate tracking, JS/TS scenario regression suite, and regression alerts.
